title: paronychia minima
intro: Paronychia minima, also known as lesser paronychia, is a flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae. It is a small annual herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions such as acne and wounds. The leaves and roots of the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions to take advantage of its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
